REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENBERG, ASHER
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENBERG, ASHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENBERG, ASHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONAMIGO, MARCO $4,712.90 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,762.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-07-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENBERG, ASHER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-21-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ASHER GREENBERG IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MARCO BONAMIGO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, BUT APPEARED TO BE HAVING TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES. DEFENDANT SEEMED TO BE UNABLE TO START VIDEO OR AUDIO IN ZOOM. NUMEROUS REQUEST TO DEFENDANT TO TURN ON HIS VIDEO AND AUDIO WERE NOT RESPONDED TO. THE COURT WAS EVENTUALLY ABLE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT INTO THE ZOOM ROOM AS A PARTICIPANT, BUT WAS STILL UNABLE TO HAVE VIDEO OR AUDIO CAPABILITY. AT THE TIME OF THE CALLING OF THE CASE, DEFENDANT WAS NO LONGER ON ZOOM. COURT CONTINUES THIS ON IT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW DEFENDANT ONE LAST OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR. THIS WILL BE THE LAST AND FINAL CONTINUANCE. NO OTHER CONTINUANCES ARE ALLOWED. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR WITHOUT GOOD CAUSE, THE MATTER WILL PROCEED WITHOUT HIM. THE COURT NOTES THAT DEFENDANT HAS APPEARED BY ZOOM TWO TIME PRIOR AND THEN HAS NOT BEEN AVAILABLE WHEN THE MATTER WAS CALLED. ZOOM APPEARANCE IS ALLOWED FOR ALL PARTIES. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BONAMIGO, MARCO
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENBERG, ASHER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2021 - JUDGMENT. REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON SEP-21-2021 IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF ASHER GREENBERG IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MARCO BONAMIGO IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. AT THE LAST HEARING DEFENDANT MARCO BONAMIGO WAS PRESENT ON ZOOM BUT WAS HAVING TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES ALLOWING HIS VIDEO AND AUDIO TO OPEN UP. AT THE TIME THE MATTER WAS CALLED DEFENDANT WAS NOT LONGER ON ZOOM. COURT CONTINUED THIS MATTER TO ALLOW DEFENDANT A FINAL OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. MATTER MOVES FORWARD WITH TRIAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GREENBERG, ASHER AS TO DEFENDANT BONAMIGO, MARCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-27-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BONAMIGO, MARCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-24-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BONAMIGO, MARCO
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED** UNTIMELY
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ASHER GREENBERG IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF INSTRUCTED HOW TO SUBMIT A ZOOM REQUEST. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT MARCO BONAMINGO VIA ZOOM, BUT HAD TECHNICAL DIFFICULTIES AND WAS ASKED TO SIGN OFF AND SIGN ON AGAIN. THE DEFENDANT SIGNED OFF BUT NEVER CAME BACK ON ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-21-2021 AT 3:30. TO ALLOW DEFENDANT ONE LAST OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR. NO OTHER CONTINUANCE ARE ALLOWED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GREENBERG, ASHER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-06-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ASHER GREENBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCO BONAMINGO IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAVIE SERVICE. DEFENDANT INFORMED OF PROPER PROCEEDURE FOR APPEARING BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT ADVISED THE COURT THAT HE SENT IN EXHIBITS TWO DAYS AGO:THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE DEFENDANT EXHIBITS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BONAMIGO, MARCO
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS)FILED BY THE DEFENDANT. THE REQUEST IS: GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2021 AT 1:30PM)
